violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw oysters were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as cooked lobster in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the glasswasher at bar was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use dishmachine in kitchen to sanitize all glass ware until unit is properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Various pickled foods were observed held past 7 days. Foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

-Establishment was observed vacuum packaging raw and cooked seafood and such as salmon, shrimp, lobster and clam meat. Vacuum packaged seafoods products were voluntarily disposed of. -Establishment was also observed vacuum packaging cooked lamb shanks and raw meats. Establishment to cease process. Cooked lamb shanks were voluntarily disposed of. Establishment must submit plans and receive approval from RIDOH CFP for all specialized processes. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Grab and go foods in the TAC shop (packaged and made in the food establishment's main kitchen) are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Stagnant water was observed in food processor. Equipment and utensils to be air dried prior to storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
Shrimp cocktail and Calabrian chicken were observed held past 7 days. Foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: 1. slicer rubber guard 2. cold drawer for prep unit New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
TAC shop does not have a 3 bay sink. Establishment must install a 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
TAC shop was lacking a mop sink. Facility to have a mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
